problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
